reading.title: Reading: A student card
reading.passage:
Name: Anna Smith
Age: 19
Nationality: British
Occupation: Student
Address: 45 Green Street, London
Email: anna.smith@email.com

questions.question: Anna is 19 years old.
questions.explanation: Thông tin "Age: 19" cho thấy điều này đúng.

questions.question: Anna is a teacher.
questions.explanation: "Occupation: Student" — Anna là sinh viên, không phải giáo viên.

questions.question: Anna has a brother.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn không đề cập đến anh em của Anna.

reading.title: Reading: My family
reading.passage: Hi, I'm Tom. This is my family. My father is a doctor and my mother is a nurse. I have one sister. Her name is Kate. We aren't a big family, but we are very happy.

questions.question: Tom's father is a doctor.
questions.explanation: Văn bản nói rõ "My father is a doctor".

questions.question: Tom has two sisters.
questions.explanation: Tom chỉ có một người em gái, Kate.
